message:
fix(repair): persist adaptive autopilot state across policy updates and add coverage

The adaptive_overhead autopilot in ScrubWithRecovery::update_adaptive_policy
was extracted via as_mut() but Bayesian posterior updates were silently
discarded because the modified copy was never written back. Switch to
Copy-based extraction with explicit write-back so posterior alpha/beta
accumulate correctly across scrub rounds.

Also:
- Add manual Debug impl for FlushPinToken (Box<dyn Send+Sync> is not Debug)
- Apply rustfmt line-length fixes across ffs-block and ffs-repair
- Add two integration tests covering adaptive policy decision logging and
  symbol refresh count propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
